Databricks Certified ML ProfessionalPractice App · 216 questions · offline single file

Mock Exam

Simulates the real Databricks Certified Machine Learning Professional exam:

  • 60 questions drawn from the pool of 216 (a new set every attempt).
  • 120 minutes countdown — the exam auto-submits when time runs out.
  • Passing score: 70% (42 of 60 correct).
  • Correct answers, explanations and your final score are revealed only after you submit.
  • Most questions are single-choice; a few are multiple-choice (marked, select all that apply).
  • Flag questions you want to revisit — they are highlighted in the question palette.
  • Adaptive draw: questions you answered wrong before (in Training or past mock attempts, including ones left unanswered at submit) get a proportionally higher chance of being drawn; questions you keep getting right appear less often.

Training mode shows 20 questions per page, no time limit. Click an option to see immediately whether it is correct, together with an explanation of why the right answer is right and the others are wrong. Progress is saved in your browser. Every wrong answer here also feeds the adaptive Mock Exam draw, so questions you miss will show up more often in future mock attempts.

Generated from “databricks-certified-machine-learning-professional-full-answers-v2.pdf” (216 questions). Explanations were AI-generated for study purposes — verify against official Databricks documentation when in doubt.
